disasm: andeq   r0, r0, r3, lsr r1
push    {r4, r5, r6, r7, r8, lr}

andeq   r0, r0, pc, lsl r1
andeq   r8, r0, r7, ror r7
push    {r4, r5, r6, r7, r8, lr}
pop     {r4, r5, r6, r7, r8, lr}
